{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322190009E1BF05644EFECEB77797"}"},"total":279},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7460394672064250686","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，超甜，全文无虐，没有误会，攻对受一见钟情，一整个爱住，就算刚开始嘴硬装的好像不喜欢受也忍不住宠他哈哈哈哈，受开始也以为攻不喜欢他，所以有点怕，很快就被人养的爱撒娇爱粘人了，超可爱的！
没啥雷点，也算是没有副cp，就最后两章的时候养的俩小孩儿算是cp吧，但也就没几句话，不影响，番外有一章我没看，基本可以无视，对雷副cp的很友好！","text_exts":[{"e":23,"s":19,"text":"一见钟情","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%80%E8%A7%81%E9%92%9F%E6%83%85&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774177209CEB77797%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227460394672064250686%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227405585960592739390%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%80%E8%A7%81%E9%92%9F%E6%83%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1737014188,"group_id":"7405585960592739390","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"重度厌渣人士，烂黄瓜攻退退退","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1JvO0iU0K8ppP3lZrD5ny8oB6pr+kYLPQ5XyRYoqiD6","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/95afd721d9aa4c9391a54c699dede473~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706148&x-signature=Dd1yDFBER3t4DFPjD7RS%2B%2FrJ8jI%3D","user_id":"3505675061439096","user_name":"铁血洁癖（暴躁版）"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3505675061439096","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7405585960592739390","book_info":{"abstract":"撒娇精笨蛋美人·喜欢男人受➕嘴硬心软·自以为直男真香攻
双男主➕病弱受➕HE➕古代背景➕温馨谈恋爱

云杳得了个给昭王殿下制香的活
好消息是这活既体面俸禄还高，昭王待他如弟弟一般好
坏消息是昭王平生最厌龙阳之事，而他恰好喜欢男子
——————
和云杳认识第一天，裴璟问他：你可喜欢男子？
云杳：不喜欢！
裴璟很满意
和云杳认识第三个月，裴璟叮嘱他：杳杳不准喜欢男子
云杳：好哦
裴璟还是很满意
和云杳认识半年，裴璟再问他：杳杳真的不喜欢男子吗？
云杳：嗯嗯！
裴璟有些伤心
和云杳认识一年，裴璟求他：杳杳能不能喜欢男子试试，比如我？
云杳：o.o

stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7430835584426443545","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"感觉作者真的很有墨水，描写很细腻，物件的名字呀、场景的布局呀、人物的神态等等真的都很生动。而且是很有见识也很有文化底蕴的感觉，可能是没有那么多人讨论的原因吧，可以慢慢看。当然了，总是又很平淡的描写，创造惊为天人的绝世大甜，我已经在屏幕这边尖叫抓狂了，偏偏杳杳和裴璟倒是很平静。
场景的描写真的很棒，能想出来还能用仿古的形式写出来，真的有真才实学的喔。这么狗血的人设效果在作者的好功底下真的算清新脱俗了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1730129007,"group_id":"7405585960592739390","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我心匪石，不可转也。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0HNxdnZY3odJDT5lOVqpZn1m7A7BVqhkbkNeO1RWRKY","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/73cdabcdd74f4a0ba017e5a05e102ffd~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705595&x-signature=JK5dmSE03HiP5hx7l0iKAwwdebk%3D","user_id":"2175314931758851","user_name":"薄黛"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2175314931758851","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7405585960592739390","book_info":{"abstract":"撒娇精笨蛋美人·喜欢男人受➕嘴硬心软·自以为直男真香攻
